title: epilobium pubens var. strictum
intro: Epilobium pubens var. strictum, also known as the stiff willowherb, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its hairy stems and yellowish flowers. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally employed to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Epilobium pubens var. strictum include its potential to reduce urinary tract infections, alleviate hemorrhaging, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat conditions such as bladder infections and hemorrhoids.
